hero.title: Skills and services
hero.description: A category-driven view of the tools, systems, and delivery strengths behind graphic design, live tournament production, and software work.

categories.label: Graphic Design
categories.description: Brand visuals, social creatives, thumbnail systems, and polished marketing assets that feel sharp across desktop and mobile surfaces.

items.title: Figma
items.description: Layout direction, design systems, and fast visual exploration before production starts.

items.title: Photoshop
items.description: High-impact social graphics, retouching, and thumbnail work tuned for stronger click-through.

items.title: Illustrator
items.description: Vector marks, logo systems, and scalable graphic assets that stay crisp everywhere.

items.title: Framer
items.description: Quick campaign pages and presentation-ready visual prototypes for client sign-off.

items.title: Tailwind CSS
items.description: Turning visual systems into reusable UI primitives once the design moves into code.

categories.label: Tournament Organising (LiveStreaming)
categories.description: Live-stream-ready assets, production coordination, and broadcast support for competitive events that need to feel composed under pressure.

items.title: OBS Studio
items.description: Scene orchestration, live switching, overlays, and stream-ready production setup.

items.title: Discord
items.description: Team coordination, player communication, and tournament flow management behind the scenes.

items.title: YouTube Live
items.description: Publishing, live distribution, and audience-facing stream presentation for event coverage.

items.title: Figma
items.description: Broadcast graphics, bracket visuals, and sponsor-ready overlays before stream day.

items.title: GSAP
items.description: Motion timing and animated stream graphics that make live broadcasts feel more premium.

categories.label: Software Design and Development
categories.description: Product thinking, interface design, and production-ready implementation for websites and app experiences that need both clarity and polish.

items.title: Next.js
items.description: App Router builds with clean structure, strong performance, and flexible UI composition.

items.title: React
items.description: Reusable component systems that stay maintainable as the product surface expands.

items.title: TypeScript
items.description: Safer interfaces, cleaner refactors, and stronger data contracts across the whole app.

items.title: Tailwind CSS
items.description: A fast visual system for shipping polished layouts with consistency and control.

items.title: Node.js
items.description: Practical backend flows, APIs, and integrations that support the frontend cleanly.

items.title: Vercel
items.description: Preview workflows, deployment loops, and faster iteration once the product is moving.
